allow: Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/prediction-markets -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""I run a small electronics import business, $3M revenue, 80% from China. Terrified of tariffs going to 60%.""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/prediction-markets -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"": ""I run a small electronics import business, $3M revenue, 80% from China. Terrified of tariffs going to 60%.""}')
